name: FIR4Tap
description: 4-tap box-average FIR filter (h=[0.25,0.25,0.25,0.25]). Computes y = 0.25*(x0+x1+x2+x3). x0 is the newest sample, x3 the oldest.

behavior.code:
# Box-average FIR: multiply each tap by 0.25 then accumulate
coef_fmt = Unsigned(0, -15)         # U1.15 — 0.25 is exact
out_fmt  = Signed(1, -15)           # S2.15 — enough headroom for sum
c = Const(coef_fmt, 0.25)
m0 = (x0 * c).keep_full()
m1 = (x1 * c).keep_full()
m2 = (x2 * c).keep_full()
m3 = (x3 * c).keep_full()
acc = ((m0 + m1).keep_full() + (m2 + m3).keep_full()).keep_full()
return acc.requantize(out_fmt, round='truncate', saturate='saturate')
